content:
## Review Verdict: **VERIFIED**

All 10 criteria pass. One minor finding below; no blockers or majors.

---

### Minor

**Inaccurate hop count in comment**
- **File:** `tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/test/playwright/new-chat-id-cli-flow.spec.ts:29–33`
- **Issue:** Comment says "from `src/test/playwright/` that's four parent hops" but the code correctly uses five `..` segments:
  ```
  src/test/playwright → src/test → src → tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration → tools → <repo>
  ```
  That is 5 hops, not 4. The `REPO_ROOT` value produced by line 34 is correct; only the prose count is wrong.
- **Fix:** Change "four parent hops" to "five parent hops".

---

### Criterion-by-criterion confirmation

| # | Criterion | Status |
|---|-----------|--------|
| 1 | `chatsessionid-takeover.spec.ts` — three tests at process boundary, homeOverride pattern | ✓ All three legs correct; no modal interaction; `HOME` + `USERPROFILE` both set via `homeOverride` in test 2 |
| 2 | `chatsessionid-missing-tolerance.spec.ts` — three tolerance branches | ✓ Omitted-key verified via `"chatSessionId" in` guard; null verified via `.toBeNull()`; post-population refusal checks exit 4 + both IDs + state unchanged |
| 3 | `new-chat-id-cli-flow.spec.ts` — three CLI legs | ✓ UUID v4 regex enforces version nibble `4` + variant `[89ab]`; env-fallback branch exercised by passing `env: { CHAT_SESSION_ID }` without `chatSessionId` opt; idempotency test re-emits same value. `REPO_ROOT` code (5 `..`) is correct despite comment (see Minor above) |
| 4 | `electronLaunch.ts` helper extensions | ✓ `typeof === 'string'` gate: `undefined` → no arg, `null` → no arg (fall-through-to-env), string → `--chat-session-id <value>`. `seedOrchestratorBlock`: key-absent / null / string shapes all survive the post-spread `delete` gate correctly; existing callers (no `chatSessionId` in overrides) produce identical pre-Session-5 blocks |
| 5 | `session-state-schema.md` | ✓ JSON shape `string | null`; H4 triple; chatSessionId source (hook vs CLI); tolerant-on-read (both branches); H3 TTY prompt; force-override log with both IDs; lifecycle lock (dual-acquire, 30s poll, exit 5/3); block-null invariant extended; worked example carries UUID |
| 6 | `ai_router/docs/close-out.md` | ✓ Orchestrator-clear row added to Section 0 table; `closeout_succeeded` payload lists four fields + legacy degradation (omit, not empty-string); Section 2 no-separate-wipe note; Section 3 snapshot-before-clear ordering; Section 4 stale-chatSessionId + TTY prompt |
| 7 | `docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md` | ✓ Holder identity triple; chatSessionId source paragraph; H3 TTY prompt; tolerant-on-read; force-override both IDs; Q4 payload note; lifecycle lock (Q5); Lightweight `new_chat_id` paste |
| 8 | `docs/cross-repo-checkout-notice.md` | ✓ Header Set 036 update + swap guidance; versions 0.7.0 / 0.19.0; H4 triple; chatSessionId source; refusal example with IDs; 4-item resolution list including takeover modal/CLI; tolerant-on-read; close-out + Q4 payload; lifecycle lock; Lightweight paste; paster notes updated |
| 9 | Cross-tier doc/code drift | ✓ Internal consistency across all four docs: close-out payload field list, TTY prompt contract (`_is_interactive_tty` both stdin+stderr), lifecycle lock 30s default — all aligned. No contradictions with audit-locked verdicts (Q1/Q3/Q4/Q5/H4/tolerant-on-read) |
| 10 | Out-of-scope check | ✓ Diff touches only the four docs + `electronLaunch.ts` + three new spec files. No changes to `session-sets-tree.spec.ts` or `multi-in-progress.spec.ts` (Session 6 scope) |
